prompts:
"A cute teddy bear clipart illustration in soft watercolor style.

Character:
Plush teddy bear with round baby proportions.
Soft fluffy fur with clearly visible texture.
Gentle, sweet facial expression.
Small black eyes and tiny nose.
Very cute and comforting appearance.

Fur color:
Warm light brown teddy bear fur.
Soft caramel and honey tones.
Gentle pastel brown.
Very cute and comforting appearance.

Pose:
Neutral balanced pose that naturally fits the scene item.

Scene item:
Teddy standing relaxed

Style:
Hand-painted watercolor.
Soft pastel color palette.
Light paper texture.
No outlines.
Not cartoon.
Not vector.
Not 3D.

Fur details:
Visible fluffy fur texture created with soft watercolor brush strokes.
Fine feathered edges around the silhouette.
Subtle uneven fur strands.
High quality fur texture.
Rounded soft shapes.
Not smooth plush texture.
Not fabric.
Not felt.

Anatomy:
Simple symmetrical teddy bear anatomy.
Two arms and two legs only.
Legs straight or slightly bent, standing pose.
Feet together, clearly separated.
No sitting pose.
No crossed legs.
No duplicated limbs.
No extra paws.
No overlapping limbs.
Clear silhouette.

Shading:
Very soft internal shading only.
Smooth color transitions.
No external shading.
No hard contrast.

Background:
Pure solid white background.
Isolated.
Absolutely no shadows.
No grounding shadow.
No soft halo.
No watercolor wash around the character.
No background texture.
No environment.
No floor.

Composition:
Full body visible.
Centered.
Consistent scale across all images.
Natural interaction with the scene item.
Clipart cutout style.

Quality:
High resolution.
Clean professional clipart.
Perfect for digital and print use.

Restrictions:
No text.
No watermark.
No logo.
No frame.
No cropped parts.

Remove all shadows, including contact shadows under paws or body.
If any shadow, halo, background tint, or artifact appears, remove it completely.
No visible ground or surface.
No cast shadow under the character.
No hard or soft shadow.
Character may sit naturally, but without visible ground elements.
"
